scripts.mcp:install: echo 'TODO: implement mcp:install (uv tool install or shell wrapper)' && exit 1
scripts.build: npm run protocol:generate && npm run build:extension
scripts.protocol:generate: npm run protocol:generate:extension && npm run protocol:generate:server
scripts.protocol:generate:extension: echo 'TODO: implement TypeScript Zod codegen from protocol/*.json (json-schema-to-zod CLI does not support directories; write a Node script that iterates protocol/ and calls jsonSchemaToZod programmatically)' && exit 1
scripts.protocol:generate:server: rm -rf server/protocol && uv run datamodel-codegen --input protocol --input-file-type jsonschema --output server/protocol
